<?php namespace Resend\Exceptions; use Exception; class ErrorException extends Exception { /** * Creates a new Error Exception instance. */ public function __construct(private readonly array $contents) { parent::__construct($contents['message']); } /** * Get the error message. */ public function getErrorMessage(): string { return $this->getMessage(); } /** * Get the error type */ public function getErrorType(): string { return $this->contents['type']; } /** * Get the error code. */ public function getErrorCode(): int { return $this->contents['code']; } }
